description: A subject MOVES across a themed pastel scene; the hook title reveals letter-by-letter, in-place (faint->pop), IN THE SUBJECT'S WAKE — each letter appears behind the subject as it passes — synced to the subject's motion. The emphasis word is red.
whenToUse: The opening hook, when a single moving subject can carry the title across the frame.
generalize: The subject, HOW it moves, and the scene are SLOTS — it need NOT fly or glide. A bird glides, a car drives, a person walks, a fish swims, a leaf drifts, a ball rolls. Pick whatever the topic calls for. The essence is only: a subject crosses the frame and the title appears in its wake. Background is a palette FIELD the agent chooses, never a fixed hardcoded image or colour.
produces: gpt-image-2 start/end frames (subject enters one side, exits the other; add parallax if the scene suits it) -> Veo motion plate -> Remotion HeroVeoTitle overlay (title in the subject's wake).

subject.note: any moving subject fitting the topic (animal, vehicle, object, person...)

motion.note: how it crosses the frame: glide, walk, drive, swim, drift, roll... NOT always flying

field.note: choose an appropriate background field from the palette below

timing.note: letter triggers locked to the MEASURED subject trajectory (playbook §5), not a linear guess

styleLock: The Prepare-Prompt node prepends STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE to the start/end FRAME prompts (gpt-image-2) and STYLE_BLOCK_VIDEO to the Veo MOTION prompt (from /catalog style). You write ONLY subject + motion + scene + field — never the style itself.
rules: You write only subject/motion/scene/field; the pipeline guarantees the pastel style (image lock on frames, video lock on the Veo motion prompt).
The subject need not fly/glide — pick a motion that fits the topic.
Background is a CHOSEN palette field, never a fixed hardcoded image or colour.
Never bake the title into the image/Veo output — text is Remotion-only.
Title reveal = per-letter in-place fade in the subject's wake, synced to measured subject X; red only on the emphasis word.
Veo is expensive — reserve this treatment for the opening/hero beat.
